---
title: "HW5"
author: "Bo"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r cars}
data = read.csv("processed.csv", header = TRUE)

data = na.omit(data)

data$num = ifelse(data$num == 0, 0, 1)

head(data)
```


```{r}
# split dataset into training and testing
library(caTools)

# set up baseline regression: logistic regression. 
library(dplyr)

# random forest
library(randomForest)

# boosting algorithms, here gbm is used, there are other two boosting algorithms
library(gbm)
library(adabag)

# cross validation
library(caret)

```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# splitting dataset
split = sample.split(data, SplitRatio = 0.8)
data.train = subset(data, split == "TRUE")
data.test = subset(data, split == "FALSE")
dim(data.train)
dim(data.test)
```


```{r}
#which(is.na(data))
#sum(is.na(data))
```


```{r}
#names(data)
logis = glm(as.factor(num)~age+sex+cp+trestbps+chol+fbs+restecg+thalach+exang+oldpeak+slope+ca+thal, data=data.train, family = "binomial")
logis
summary(logis)
logis.pred = predict(logis, data.test, type="response")
logis.pred = as.data.frame(logis.pred)
logis.pred = ifelse(logis.pred >= 0.5, 1, 0)
logis.confusion = confusionMatrix(as.factor(data.test$num), as.factor(logis.pred))
logis.confusion
```


```{r}
random = randomForest(as.factor(num)~age+sex+cp+trestbps+chol+fbs+restecg+thalach+exang+oldpeak+slope+ca+thal, data=data.test, importance=TRUE)

#importance(random, type=1)
#importance(random, type=2)
varImpPlot(random)

random$confusion
training.accuracy = sum(diag(random$confusion))/sum(random$confusion)
cat("\n", "above is the accuracy of training dataset: ")
training.accuracy

random.pred = predict(random, data.test, type="class")

random.confusion = confusionMatrix(as.factor(random.pred), as.factor(data.test$num))
random.confusion
```



```{r}
boost = suppressWarnings(gbm(
  as.factor(num)~age+sex+cp+trestbps+chol+fbs+restecg+thalach+exang+oldpeak+slope+as.integer(ca)+as.integer(thal),
  data = data.train,
  distribution = "gaussian",
  n.trees = 500,
  interaction.depth = 3,
  shrinkage = 0.05,
  n.minobsinnode = 2
))
boost.pred = suppressWarnings(predict(boost, newdata = data.test))
boost.pred = as.factor(ifelse(boost.pred >=0.5, 1, 0))
data.test$num = as.factor(data.test$num)
confusionMatrix(boost.pred, data.test$num)
summary(boost)
```
